================================================================================
                        JOB DESCRIPTION: MARKETING DIRECTOR
================================================================================

Company: Evergreen Hospitality Group
Location: Chicago, IL (Hybrid - 3 days in-office)
Employment Type: Full-Time
Department: Marketing & Brand Strategy
Reports To: Chief Marketing Officer
Salary Range: $145,000 - $175,000 + Performance Bonus

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                              ABOUT THE COMPANY
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Evergreen Hospitality Group is a premier boutique hotel management company 
operating 28 luxury and lifestyle properties across the United States and 
Caribbean. Founded in 2008, we have built our reputation on delivering 
exceptional guest experiences through innovative marketing strategies and 
authentic brand storytelling.

Our portfolio includes award-winning properties ranging from urban boutique 
hotels to beachfront resorts, each with its own unique identity while 
maintaining the Evergreen standard of excellence. We pride ourselves on our 
commitment to sustainability, community engagement, and creating memorable 
moments for every guest.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                              POSITION OVERVIEW
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We are seeking an experienced and dynamic Marketing Director to lead our 
corporate marketing initiatives and drive brand awareness across our expanding 
portfolio of properties. This role is responsible for developing and executing 
comprehensive marketing strategies that increase occupancy rates, enhance 
brand equity, and support revenue growth objectives.

The ideal candidate will bring a blend of creative vision and analytical 
rigor, with proven experience in hospitality or luxury brand marketing. You 
will lead a team of 8 marketing professionals and collaborate closely with 
property-level marketing coordinators, our revenue management team, and 
external agency partners.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                           KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

STRATEGIC PLANNING & BRAND MANAGEMENT (30%)
• Develop and execute annual marketing plans aligned with company revenue 
  targets and brand positioning objectives
• Lead brand strategy initiatives including visual identity updates, messaging 
  frameworks, and brand guidelines across all properties
• Conduct competitive analysis and market research to identify emerging trends 
  and opportunities in the hospitality sector
• Establish and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) for all marketing 
  activities, providing regular reports to executive leadership
• Oversee brand partnerships and sponsorship opportunities that align with 
  company values and target demographics

DIGITAL MARKETING & E-COMMERCE (25%)
• Direct all digital marketing channels including website optimization, SEO/SEM, 
  email marketing, and social media strategy
• Manage online reputation across review platforms (TripAdvisor, Yelp, Google) 
  and develop response protocols for guest feedback
• Oversee the company's CRM strategy and database marketing initiatives to 
  drive repeat bookings and loyalty program engagement
• Analyze website analytics and booking funnel performance to optimize 
  conversion rates and reduce acquisition costs
• Collaborate with revenue management on dynamic pricing communication and 
  promotional campaign timing

CAMPAIGN DEVELOPMENT & EXECUTION (25%)
• Conceptualize and produce integrated marketing campaigns for property 
  launches, seasonal promotions, and special events
• Manage relationships with creative agencies, photographers, videographers, 
  and content creators
• Develop compelling content strategies including blog posts, video content, 
  influencer partnerships, and user-generated content programs
• Coordinate PR initiatives and media relations to secure earned media 
  coverage in travel and lifestyle publications
• Plan and execute trade show presence and industry event participation

TEAM LEADERSHIP & BUDGET MANAGEMENT (20%)
• Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 8 marketing professionals including 
  specialists in digital marketing, content creation, and graphic design
• Manage annual marketing budget of $3.2 million, ensuring efficient 
  allocation across channels and campaigns
• Conduct performance reviews, establish team goals, and create professional 
  development opportunities
• Foster collaboration between corporate marketing and property-level teams
• Build and maintain vendor relationships, negotiating contracts and managing 
  agency performance

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                         REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

EDUCATION
• Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, 
  or a related field required
• Master's degree in Marketing, MBA, or equivalent advanced education preferred

EXPERIENCE
• Minimum 8 years of progressive marketing experience, with at least 4 years 
  in a leadership/management role
• Demonstrated experience in hospitality, travel, luxury goods, or lifestyle 
  brand marketing strongly preferred
• Proven track record of developing and executing successful multi-channel 
  marketing campaigns with measurable ROI
• Experience managing marketing budgets of $2 million or more
• Background in both B2C and B2B marketing strategies

TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Proficiency in marketing technology platforms including:
  - CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar)
  - Marketing automation tools (Marketo, Pardot, Mailchimp)
  - Analytics platforms (Google Analytics, Adobe Analytics, Tableau)
  - Social media management tools (Sprout Social, Hootsuite)
  - Project management software (Asana, Monday.com, Basecamp)
• Strong understanding of SEO/SEM best practices and paid media strategies
• Experience with brand management and asset management systems
• Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and Google Workspace

KNOWLEDGE & COMPETENCIES
• Deep understanding of hospitality industry dynamics, consumer behavior, 
  and competitive landscape
• Strong financial acumen with ability to analyze campaign performance data 
  and make data-driven decisions
• Excellent written and verbal communication skills with ability to present 
  to executive leadership
• Creative thinking combined with analytical problem-solving abilities
• Understanding of legal requirements related to marketing claims, 
  photography rights, and data privacy (GDPR, CCPA)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                         PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Experience with luxury or premium brand positioning and messaging
• Familiarity with hospitality-specific platforms (Opera, Revinate, ReviewPro)
• International marketing experience including localization strategies
• Knowledge of sustainability marketing and responsible tourism initiatives
• Experience with loyalty program development and management
• Video production experience or strong oversight capabilities
• Established relationships with travel media and industry influencers
• Fluency in Spanish or other languages (a plus)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                      LEADERSHIP & SOFT SKILLS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Exceptional interpersonal skills with ability to influence across all 
  organizational levels
• Strong project management capabilities with attention to detail and 
  ability to manage multiple priorities
• Collaborative leadership style that fosters creativity and innovation
• Adaptability in a fast-paced, evolving industry environment
• Problem-solving orientation with ability to navigate ambiguity
• Passion for travel, hospitality, and creating memorable experiences
• Demonstrated ability to build and maintain high-performing teams

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                         BENEFITS & PERKS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Competitive base salary with annual performance bonus opportunity (up to 25%)
• Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
• 401(k) retirement plan with 6% company match
• Generous paid time off (25 days PTO plus holidays)
• Complimentary stays at Evergreen properties (after 90 days)
• Professional development budget ($3,000 annually)
• Hybrid work schedule with flexibility
• Wellness programs including gym membership reimbursement
• Employee discounts at partner restaurants and attractions
• Parental leave (16 weeks paid for primary caregivers)
• Relocation assistance available for qualified candidates

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                        APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To apply, please submit the following:
1. Resume/CV highlighting relevant marketing leadership experience
2. Cover letter explaining your interest in Evergreen Hospitality Group and 
   how your experience aligns with this role
3. Portfolio or examples of marketing campaigns you have led (optional but 
   encouraged)
4. Professional references available upon request

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                      EQUAL OPPORTUNITY STATEMENT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Evergreen Hospitality Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We celebrate 
diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all 
employees. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment 
without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender 
identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, or any other protected 
characteristic.

================================================================================
